name: Add New Chemicals from Regulatory Notification
description: The Green Valley Water Facility (Colchester, VT) has begun using two new chemicals as part of an infrastructure upgrade. A regulatory notification document with the required chemical inventory details has been provided to the facility. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (already open), import the facility's baseline data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\green_valley_baseline.t2s, then locate the notification document and add BOTH new chemicals to the facility's Tier II inventory with all required information exactly as specified in the notification. After adding both chemicals with complete data (including hazard classifications, quantities, and storage locations), save and export the updated submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\new_chemicals_added.t2s.

expected_chemicals.name: Ammonia (anhydrous)
required_hazards: Serious eye damage or eye irritation
expected_chemicals.storage_temperature: Less than ambient temperature but not cryogenic

expected_chemicals.name: Propane
expected_chemicals.storage_description: Outdoor tank farm - Bulk propane tank
